description_long: This is a classic-style scooter with a teal blue body and a brown leather seat, evoking the design of vintage Vespa models. The scooter features a rounded front shield with chrome accents, a single round headlight, and a rearview mirror mounted on the left handlebar. The seat is long and cushioned, suitable for two riders, and the rear section includes a yellow license plate with black text. The wheels are medium-sized with silver rims, and the bodywork is smooth and glossy, with chrome trim along the sides and footrest area. The handlebars are straight with black grips, and the overall build suggests a sturdy metal frame with some plastic and rubber components. This scooter is designed for urban commuting and leisure rides, offering both style and practicality.
description: A vintage-style teal scooter with a brown leather seat, chrome accents, and a rounded, glossy body. It features a front headlight, rearview mirror, and a yellow license plate.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the brown seat, teal rear fender, and yellow license plate with black text.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the scooter, brown seat, chrome trim, and front headlight.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the rounded shield, headlight, handlebar, and single front wheel.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the seat, chrome details, and the scooter's overall streamlined shape.
attribute_deck_design: medium-width, smooth, integrated with the body, chrome footrest area
attribute_brand_logo: Yellow license plate with black text 'F4T BOY' at the rear; no other visible brand logo
